title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: One Workflow for Beautiful Frontends (LIVE)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a workflow combining Claude (Opus) for planning and Gemini 3.5 Flash for UI design in a single frontend development pipeline. The approach leverages each model's strengths: Opus for logic and integration, Gemini for visual design, executed through the Archon framework.
